name: urban_agriculture_mutual_aid_request_lumen_st_lt
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Urban Agriculture, the situation tagged internally around urban agriculture mutual aid request lumen st lt has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elena Morales

agents.name: Harper Ishikawa

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Elena Morales must choose under short term versus long term. What does Elena Morales do?
